Pag-IBIG ROPA # 858202508190022 – Lot 03 Blk. 18 Phase I LUMINA ILOILO ABILAY NORTE, OTON, ILOILO, 5020 – 2nd Public Auction on Jul. 27, 2026 – Jul. 31, 2026
slide 1 of 1
1 / 1
Editorial Staff
Published 2026/07/20 - 1 day ago
₱408,690.00
Location
IloiloOton, Iloilo
Category
Real Estate / Foreclosed Properties
Property ID
858202508190022
Lot Area (sqm)
36.00
Floor Area (sqm)
22.00
Description

This property is from the Tranche # OPA1520099(2nd Public Auction). It is handled by Pag-IBIG BACOLOD BRANCH.

Discover more
Geographic Reference
Property tax calculator
Taxation

ACCEPTANCE OF BIDS/OFFERS WILL BE ON: Jul. 27, 2026 12:00 AM – Jul. 31, 2026 11:59 PM. More details below.

Property details

  • Property Source: Pag-IBIG
  • Handling Branch: BACOLOD BRANCH
  • ROPA ID: 858202508190022 (Newly-Listed:2026-JULY-21)
  • Disposal Stage: 2nd Public Auction Tranche # OPA1520099
  • Property Location (address): Lot 03 Blk. 18 Phase I LUMINA ILOILO ABILAY NORTE, OTON, ILOILO, 5020
  • Region: REGION 6 (WESTERN VISAYAS)
  • Province: ILOILO
  • City/Municipality: OTON
  • Subdivision: LUMINA ILOILO
  • Type: Row House
  • TCT/CCT Number: 090-2020004231
  • Lot Area (sqm): 36.00
  • Floor Area (sqm): 22.00
  • MINIMUM BID PRICE (PHP): PHP 408,690.00
  • Appraisal Date: 23/Jun/2025
  • Remarks: UNOCCUPIED – TITLE UNDER CONSOLIDATION

“UNDER CONSOLIDATION” means the Title is still under the name of the former owner/original borrower and the transfer of the title to PAG-IBIG is not yet finished. The transfer can take a long time to finish, depending on the completeness of the documents required for the transfer of the title.

Read: Pag-IBIG Acquired Assets: For Title Consolidation Meaning (Safe To Buy?)

2nd Public Auction Info, Guidelines and Step-By-Step Procedure

  • Publication Tranche: OPA1520099(2nd Public Auction)
  • Period of Acceptance of bids/offers: Jul. 27, 2026 12:00 AM – Jul. 31, 2026 11:59 PM
  • View Steps to buy on Pag-IBIG’s website:
    • https://pagibigfund.gov.ph/member_homeloans_acquiredassets_stepsindividual.html

How to view the original listing on Pag-IBIG’s website (and submit a bid/offer):

Important: Pag-IBIG’s website doesn’t support direct links to individual listings. You will need to search for it manually using the steps below (only takes 1 to 2 minutes!)

Step 1: Go to Pag-IBIG’s Online Public Auction page: https://www.pagibigfundservices.com/OnlinePublicAuction/ and scroll down to “List of Properties For Individual Sale“.

Step 2: Under “Select your Preferred Location:” choose the following:

    1. Region: REGION 6 (WESTERN VISAYAS)
    2. Province: ILOILO
    3. City/Municipality: OTON

and then click the “Search” Button

Step 3: Click the tab for 2nd Public Auction

Step 4: Find the property by looking for the listing that matches all of the following:

    1. Subdivision: LUMINA ILOILO
    2. Lot Area (sqm): 36.00
    3. Floor Area (sqm): 22.00
    4. Price: PHP 408,690.00

Tip: Properties are sorted from cheapest to highest price, scroll until you see the same price range

Step 5: Navigate pages if needed. If you don’t find it on the first page, click Next and repeat.

Note: If you reach the last page and you did not find it, Pag-IBIG has probably deleted it (they usually delete listings when the acceptance of bids/offers ends).

Step 6: Click the “View More Details” link for more information for your target property. If today’s date is within Jul. 27, 2026 12:00 AM – Jul. 31, 2026 11:59 PM, the “Submit Offer” button will be available and you can proceed with the submission of bid/offer.

Note: The “Submit Offer” button will NOT SHOW if today’s date is NOT within the Period of Acceptance of Bids/Offers

Pag-IBIG encourages prospective buyers to check their website just in case there are updates for any of their listings. For example, some listings are removed due to errors or problems with the property. The only way to check is by viewing the original listing, using the instructions above.

If you have questions about the property from Pag-IBIG’s website, PLEASE CONTACT THEM DIRECTLY! See below.

Reminder: For inquiries, more property details/clarification, please contact Pag-IBIG contact person(s) DIRECTLY!

Contact info:

Pag-IBIG Handling Branch: BACOLOD BRANCH

Telephone: 09621804546, 09611444254, 09271446454

Email: pjmabasa@pagibigfund.gov.ph, abtan@pagibigfund.gov.ph

To see answers to frequently asked questions about Pag-IBIG foreclosed properties/acquired assets, refer to the page below.

View more Pag-IBIG foreclosed properties and FAQ’s

==> Pag-IBIG foreclosed properties for sale, schedules, and FAQ’s

Disclaimer and Reminders

  • All foreclosed properties are for sale on an “AS IS, WHERE IS” basis. Interested parties are reminded to conduct proper due diligence prior to the purchase of any foreclosed property.
  • Availability, prices, and property status are subject to change without prior notice.
  • Misprints should not be construed as misrepresentation of the property.

~~~~

Pag-IBIG Does Not Accredited Real Estate Brokers/Agents

Here’s a reminder from Pag-IBIG:


Last updated on: 2026-JULY-21

Source: All data/photo (when available) are from the original listing at https://www.pagibigfundservices.com/OnlinePublicAuction/ as retrieved on 2026-JULY-21 for the JULY-2026 schedules/listings). The photo is just a preview. More photos may be available on Pag-IBIG’s website.

Disclosure: This is a Public Service Announcement for all interested parties who are looking for foreclosed properties from Pag-IBIG. We do not sell these foreclosed properties, we are NOT accredited with Pag-IBIG.

Pag-IBIG does not accredit real estate brokers/agents.

All interested parties must transact with Pag-IBIG directly.
